question: Which statement about night reading preference is most accurate?

options.A: Morning and Night preferences are about the same.
options.B: Around one-half of people in county Z prefer night.
options.C: Fewer than half of people in county Z prefer night.
options.D: More than half of people in county Z prefer night.

explanation: The Night slice is 53%, which is less than half. The misleading angle encourages choosing that more than half prefer night, but the majority is actually the Morning slice (47%).
